meta.nazev: Písmeno Z (60 bodů) — doplň zpětné otočení

cms.task_text: Doplňte chybějící blok — po diagonálním tahu se želva musí otočit zpět o [hlp]135°[/hlp] vlevo.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">135</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">85</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b4"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">135</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">85</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">135</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
